displaySummary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
displaySummary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

displayDescription.zh: Libratus 在一对一无限注德州扑克中击败顶尖职业牌手，而这类游戏包含隐藏信息和巨大的决策空间。它结合抽象博弈求解、实时残局求解和每日赛后自我改进，证明游戏 AI 可以走出完全信息棋盘。
displayDescription.en: Libratus defeated top professionals in heads-up no-limit Texas hold'em, a game with hidden information and enormous decision spaces. It combined abstract game solving, real-time endgame solving, and self-improvement after each day of play, proving that game AI could move beyond perfect-information boards.

description.en: Science article describing Libratus and heads-up no-limit poker.
description.zh: 描述 Libratus 与一对一无限注扑克的 Science 论文。

license.en: Reference link only; local exhibition graphics are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地展陈图形为原创重绘。

usage.en: Source card for the gaming AI branch
usage.zh: AI 棋牌分支的资料卡片

description.en: Fast poker-hand evolution slot from private cards to subgame refinement.
description.zh: 从暗牌局面推进到子局细化的扑克手牌快速演化槽位。

license.en: Locally generated exhibition clip from curated game-state data; no external broadcast footage is reused.
license.zh: 由策展棋局状态数据本地生成的展览短片；不复用外部转播画面。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

html.zh: 扑克把暗牌、诈唬和不确定性加入了游戏 AI 叙事。不同于国际象棋或围棋，正确行动取决于可能暗牌范围，以及对手认为你可能持有什么牌。
html.en: Poker added hidden cards, bluffing, and uncertainty to the game-AI story. Unlike chess or Go, the correct action depends on ranges of possible private hands and on what opponents believe you might hold.

html.zh: Libratus 在赛前求解紧凑抽象策略，并在困难手牌中使用实时子局求解。它随后分析每天对局中的可利用模式，并在夜间修补策略。
html.en: Libratus solved a compact abstraction before the match and used real-time subgame solving during difficult hands. It then analyzed each day for exploitable patterns and patched the strategy overnight.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Libratus 视为大型不完全信息博弈的转折点。它的长期影响在于证明：即使真实状态部分隐藏，抽象、均衡推理和定向修补仍能击败顶尖人类。
html.en: Experts generally treat Libratus as a turning point for large imperfect-information games. Its legacy is showing that abstraction, equilibrium reasoning, and targeted repair can defeat elite humans even when the real state is partly hidden.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
